required_preferences.fact: Leads daily morning briefings for her audit team as a senior auditor, setting the agenda and delegating tasks to junior members.

supersedes.fact: Joins daily morning briefings for the internal investigation team, prioritizing open collaboration over solo audit review.

required_preferences.fact: Sets a strict screen-free hour before bedtime, using guided meditation audio or voice journaling instead of physical writing or e-reading

supersedes.fact: Sets a strict screen-free hour before bedtime, switching to reading or journaling instead

required_preferences.fact: Hosts daily group dinners at home with her fiancé and his parents during their stay, preferring home-cooked, communal meals over dining out or ordering takeout.
Allocates evenings for collaborative wedding planning tasks together with her fiancé’s parents, pausing solo calendar updates to facilitate in-person input and shared decision-making.
Tracks her sleep quality nightly in a specialist-recommended sleep journal app and reviews it before each follow-up appointment
Uses speech-to-text for personal notes and CPA study summaries instead of typing or writing by hand

persona: A 28-year-old junior auditor working at a multinational corporation
